description_long: This is a large, modern multi-story house surrounded by a white fence and set on a green lawn. The structure features a flat roof with multiple terraces and large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is predominantly white, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The house includes a spacious garage, visible from the rear, and several balconies or rooftop patios. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, contributing to the contemporary look. The property is enclosed by a fence, creating a private yard area around the building.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, and a fenced green yard. The design features clean lines, rooftop terraces, and a spacious garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage doors, extensive windows, and the flat roof terraces.
description_view_2: Back view with fewer windows, a plain facade, and the fenced yard extending along the side.
description_view_3: Rear/side view displaying the garage, multiple windows, and the continuation of the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements, integrated into the clean facade.
